ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "functions" (
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each function */,
  "function_name" TEXT /* Name of the function */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the function */,
  "function_category" TEXT /* Category of the function */,
  "function_type" TEXT /* Type of the function */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "group_category" TEXT /* Category of the group */,
  "group_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_level_agreements" (
  "sla_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SLA */,
  "sla_description" TEXT /* Description of the SLA */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Response time in hours for SLA adherence */,
  "response_time_unit" TEXT /* Unit of response time */,
  "sla_category" TEXT /* Category of SLA */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sla_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement record */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of measurement */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the function related to the measurement */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the group of the measurement activity */,
  "sla_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the SLA associated with the measurement */,
  "n_value" REAL /* Numeric value for measurement parameter N */,
  "amass_value" REAL /* Accumulated mass value from the measurement */,
  "area_value" REAL /* Area measured during the assessment */,
  "gs_value" REAL /* Value of GS parameter from the measurement */,
  "lsla_value" REAL /* Service level adherence value */,
  "discriminator1" REAL /* Discriminator value 1 for detailed analysis */,
  "discriminator2" REAL /* Discriminator value 2 for additional categorization */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was taken */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used for taking the measurement */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_sla_id FOREIGN KEY ("sla_id") REFERENCES service_level_agreements ("sla_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES functions ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the data */,
  "access_browser" TEXT /* Browser used by the user to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role that the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
